scripts.build: npm run build -w @leaderkey/config-core && npm run build -w @leaderkey/dispatcher-core && npm run build -w @leaderkey/config-cli && npm run build -w @leaderkey/dispatcher-cli && npm run build -w leader-key-raycast
scripts.test: npm run test -w @leaderkey/config-core && npm run test -w @leaderkey/dispatcher-core && npm run test -w leader-key-raycast
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @leaderkey/config-core && npm run typecheck -w @leaderkey/dispatcher-core && npm run typecheck -w @leaderkey/config-cli && npm run typecheck -w @leaderkey/dispatcher-cli && npm run typecheck -w leader-key-raycast
